name: orchardcore-net
description: Setup recipe that seeds the orchardcore.net site for the Canopy theme.

Layers.Name: Always
Layers.Description: The widgets in this layer are displayed on any page of this site.

Layers.Name: Homepage
Layers.Description: The widgets in this layer are only displayed on the homepage.

Layers.Name: Developers
Layers.Description: The widgets in this layer are displayed on developer-focused pages.

Layers.Name: Business
Layers.Description: The widgets in this layer are displayed on business-focused pages.
